task_completion.description: Agent opened MedinTux to view patient records
task_completion.visual_evidence: The MedinTux application window is visible on screen, showing the patient search or patient list interface.

task_completion.description: Agent initiated the creation of the demographics report file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, vim) or terminal command is visible, showing the creation or editing of a file named 'patient_demographics_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: Report contains the correct basic patient counts
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report text explicitly includes the exact strings: 'Total Patients: 8', 'Male (H): 4', and 'Female (F): 4'.

task_completion.description: Report contains the calculated age-related statistics
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report text includes the exact labels: 'Average Age: <number>', 'Oldest Patient: <LASTNAME Firstname> (born <YYYY-MM-DD>)', and 'Youngest Patient: <LASTNAME Firstname> (born <YYYY-MM-DD>)'.

task_completion.description: Report contains the full list of patients
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report text lists the names of all 8 patients (BERNARD, THOMAS, PETIT, DURAND, MARTIN, DUBOIS, ROBERT, RICHARD).

task_completion.description: Report is saved to the exact required path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor's save dialog, title bar, or a terminal command (like 'ls' or 'cat') confirms the file is saved exactly at '/home/ga/patient_demographics_report.txt'.

integrity.description: Agent extracted data by interacting with MedinTux rather than bypassing it
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively using the MedinTux GUI to look up patient data, rather than just executing a direct SQL query against the underlying database in the terminal.

integrity.description: Agent only included the actual patients present in the database
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient names in the report must strictly match the 8 specific French names provided in the privileged information, with no fabricated or missing names.

integrity.description: Agent saved the output to a file instead of just printing to console
integrity.visual_evidence: The final output must be written to the .txt file, not merely echoed or printed to the terminal stdout without file redirection.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct file path is /home/ga/patient_demographics_report.txt. The database contains exactly 8 patients: 4 male (BERNARD, THOMAS, PETIT, DURAND) and 4 female (MARTIN, DUBOIS, ROBERT, RICHARD). The report must state 'Total Patients: 8', 'Male (H): 4', and 'Female (F): 4'.
